title: CSG introduces counter-drone ammunition enabling soldiers to neutralize UAV threats with standard rifles
description: Fiocchi, part of the CSG, has introduced a new generation of counter-drone ammunition designed to enable soldiers to effectively engage small unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) using standard-issue firearms. The solution was recently unveiled at Enforce Tac 2026 in Nuremberg, one of Europe’s leading exhibitions for internal and homeland security.
